div.head: Memorandum by the Director of the Office of Far Eastern Affairs (Butterworth) to the Under Secretary of State (Lovett)
div.p: Subject: Draft Resolution on KoreaFor text sent on November 8, see p. 1321.
There is attached for your approval a draft resolution on Korea which has received informal clearance from FE, O, UNA, EUR, and L, and from General Wedemeyer for the Army.

It is proposed that this text, which represents certain revisions by a Departmental working group of a draft submitted by the United
States Delegation to the General Assembly,See U.S. delegation position paper, October 22, p. 1315. be approved for transmittal to the Delegation as a basis for negotiation with other delegations on this subject, it being understood that the Delegation will have a reasonable margin of discretion in coordinating this draft with the views of other delegations, but that any substantive changes in its text will be cleared with the Department.
